prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `60a26a3e`.
codex_response:
Rule: find each hollow red plus (four `2`s around a zero center), then for every row and column connect consecutive plus centers by filling only the empty gap between them with blue `1`s. The summary hint was used; it matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` was needed.

Implementation is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_60a26a3e/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_60a26a3e/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_60a26a3e/generator.py). No new primitive was added. The generator explicitly samples the observed family of layouts: row pairs/triples, shared row-column pairings, rectangle layouts, and occasional stray pluses, so the built set stays in the same sparse 3-to-5-plus regime as the source task.

Validation passed end to end: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and the build produced [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/60a26a3e/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/60a26a3e/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/60a26a3e/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/60a26a3e/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/60a26a3e/previews/preview_03.png). I also spot-checked built examples from the artifact data and the rendered previews are consistent with the task family.
